description: Parametric detail templates for AI-driven detail generation via RevitMCPBridge

workflow: 1. AI reads template JSON for the requested detail type
2. AI calls getTypeAssembly(typeId) to get actual wall/floor/roof layers from the model
3. AI merges template knowledge with actual model data
4. AI calls drawLayerStack() for assembly layers OR batchDrawDetail() for custom geometry
5. AI calls batchDrawDetail() for annotations, dimensions, and detail components
6. AI can also use importSvgToDetail() for complex custom geometry
7. AI captures view image for self-review (Phase 4)

mcpMethods.getTypeAssembly: Read actual wall/floor/roof compound structure layers
mcpMethods.drawLayerStack: Auto-generate layer stack with lines, hatches, and labels
mcpMethods.batchDrawDetail: Execute multiple drawing ops (lines, arcs, fills, text, components) in one call
mcpMethods.importSvgToDetail: Import SVG markup as Revit detail elements
